name: Mrs Fields Krispies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, salt, and baking soda. Mix well and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, blend sugars with an electric mixer on medium speed until combined.
4. Add butter and mix to form a grainy paste. Scrape down the sides of the bowl.
5. Add egg and vanilla; beat on medium speed until light and fluffy.
6. Add flour mixture, rice cereal, and chocolate chunks. Mix at low speed just until blended.
7. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet, about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake for 22-24 minutes. Immediately transfer cookies to a cool flat surface to cool completely.
